prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response: Oh my god, I'm so heartbroken to hear this. I'm sending you all my love and strength right now. Please know that I'm here for you, day or night, if you need anything at all or just want to talk. My deepest condolences to you and your family.
